category_sources: Official VideoLAN GitLab page describes dav1d as an AV1 decoder targeted to be small, portable and very fast.
source_facts.description says AV1 decoder targeted to be small and fast.
display_name_sources: Official VideoLAN GitLab project heading is dav1d at https://code.videolan.org/videolan/dav1d.
docs_sources: Official GitLab project links GitLab Pages documentation at https://videolan.videolan.me/dav1d/.
Official generated docs page says dav1d Documentation and dav1d is an AV1 decoder.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has official repository value https://code.videolan.org/videolan/dav1d; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official VideoLAN GitLab page tags and description identify av1 codec decoder and fast.
